summary.reportNameZh: 2026-06 瑞幸北美 食品安全·进口合规·地方法规·舆情监测月报
summary.reportNameEn: Luckin NA Food Safety · Import Compliance · Local Regulation · Sentiment Monitor — 2026-06
summary.scopeZh: FDA / FSIS / CDC / CBP / APHIS / Federal Register / 州及地方法规 / 咖啡馆检查 / 负面舆情
summary.scopeEn: FDA / FSIS / CDC / CBP / APHIS / Federal Register / State & Local Regulation / Café Inspections / Negative Media

exclusions.zh: 不纳入与食品安全无关的动物/宠物/野生动物事件
不纳入纯商业/营销/财务/门店扩张新闻
不纳入低可信度、无来源或重复转载内容
exclusions.en: Excludes low-credibility, unsourced or reposted content

keyHighlights.zh: 本月高风险事项 203 项、关注 39 项
keyHighlights.en: 203 high-risk and 39 watch items this period

keyHighlights.zh: 州/地方合规临近：CA SB68 (2026-07-01)、NY 过敏原法 (~2026-11)、NYC added-sugar 已生效
keyHighlights.en: Imminent state/local compliance: CA SB68 (2026-07-01), NY allergen law (~2026-11), NYC added-sugar in effect

keyHighlights.zh: 进口监管：APHIS 禽类限制持续；FDA Prior Notice 基线适用；CBP CSMS 本轮无直接更新
keyHighlights.en: Import: APHIS poultry restrictions ongoing; FDA Prior Notice baseline; no direct CBP CSMS update this run

keyActions.zh: 在 2026-07-01 前完成 CA 门店主要过敏原披露实施
建立菜单/饮品 added sugars 与过敏原数据库并同步配方变更

keyActions.zh: 持续监控 CBP / APHIS / FDA Import Alerts 与州级过敏原立法趋势
keyActions.en: Monitor CBP/APHIS/FDA Import Alerts + the state allergen-bill trend

provenance.stalenessNote: NORS is annual and lags ~2–3 years.
provenance.name: CDC NORS foodborne outbreaks

provenance.stalenessNote: FSIS is meat/poultry/egg — kept only items with a café-product tag (coffee/dairy/beverage); out-of-scope meat recalls excluded. Set FSIS_USER_AGENT to avoid the 403.
provenance.name: USDA FSIS recalls

provenance.stalenessNote: ryb9-qzmw is a permit-cases dataset (no violation/result fields) — needs the correct Cambridge sanitary-inspections resource or manual intake
provenance.name: Cambridge Sanitary Inspections
